issue_title: Cleanup Scene followed by new board restores deleted boards
issue_body_preview:
Add some boards
Quickly delete those boards
Quickly select "Cleanup Scene"
Select "Yes" to clean up
Quickly press "N" for a new board
Deleted boards are restored ?!

"Cleanup Scene" is not reloading the scene data into the app properly after it completes.
- should ensure all files are flushe
test_description_zh:
1. 在故事板中添加多个画板（boards）
2. 快速删除这些新添加的画板
3. 立即选择菜单中的「Cleanup Scene」功能
4. 在弹出的确认对话框中选择「Yes」确认清理
5. 清理完成后，快速按下键盘「N」键新建一个画板
6. 观察当前场景中的画板列表
expected_result_zh: 执行 Cleanup Scene 并新建画板后，之前已删除的画板不应重新出现。场景中应仅包含新建的画板，已删除的画板数据应被正确清除，不会被恢复。
